query: Where to see traditional kabuki outside of Tokyo and Kyoto.
reasoning: Tool called without keyword filter, returning 183 records; however the cross_program_advisory block surfaces real kabuki venues (金丸座, 内子座, 八千代座, 康楽館) all outside Tokyo/Kyoto — authoritative data present but incomplete per RULE C. Primary failure: constraint_handling is the worst-hit dim (RULE B) because 歌舞伎座 (Tokyo) and 南座 (Kyoto) appear in the canonical_entities list despite the explicit 'outside Tokyo and Kyoto' constraint. No featured_cluster block present so RULE E does not apply. Specificity is 4 because named venues with QIDs and seasonal notes (e.g. April Konpira Kabuki, December 顔見世) are provided. Practical usefulness docked to 3 because the agent must sift 183-record noise to find the 4–5 relevant venues.
missing_data: Keyword-filtered get_traditional_arts(keyword='歌舞伎') response with only kabuki-designated records; explicit exclusion of Tokyo/Kyoto venues; address or access info for regional venues (e.g. Kotohira, Yamaga, Kosaka).
improvement_hint: When query intent matches kabuki keywords, auto-inject keyword='歌舞伎' arg and post-filter canonical_entities to exclude venues whose region matches the query's geographic exclusion constraint (Tokyo / Kyoto).
